query:
UPDATE order_tracking ot
JOIN (
  SELECT 
    s.transaction_id,
    COUNT(p.id) AS pallet_count
  FROM qc_scan_sessions s
  JOIN qc_pallets p ON p.session_id = s.id AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
  WHERE s.status = 'complete'
    AND s.transaction_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY s.transaction_id
) pq ON ot.extensiv_order_id = pq.transaction_id
SET ot.pallet_count = pq.pallet_count
WHERE ot.lifecycle_status IN ('ship_ready', 'shipped')
  AND (ot.pallet_count IS NULL OR ot.pallet_count = 0);
